column1: 他社に先駆けて、新技術を導入した。
column2: たしゃにさきがけて、しんぎじゅつをどうにゅうした。
column3: We introduced the new technology ahead of other companies.
column4: に先駆けて (ahead of, prior to, pioneering — being first before others)
column5: Noun + に先駆けて / に先駆けた + Noun
column6: indicates being earlier than others or taking a pioneering step before the field catches up
column8: に先駆けて = pioneering/ahead of others; に先立ち = before (formal preparatory step); に先んじて = in advance of (same); より先に = before (simple temporal)
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:に先駆けて source:authored scaffold:pending-audio
